news.t: AllianzIM to Transfer Exchange Listings and Fund Name Changes
AllianzIM Introduces Suite of Buffer Allocation ETFs to Help Simplify a Risk Management Strategy for Investors

overview.description: The AllianzIM 6 Month Buffer10 Allocation ETF (SPBX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that holds a laddered portfolio of six AllianzIM 6 Month Buffer10 ETFs. SPBX was launched on Jan 7, 2025 and is issued by Allianz.
